basic_details.job_title: TISS Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS), Mumbai
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS), Mumbai has released the official Research Associate Notification 2026 on 30 June 2026 at the official TISS website. A total of Not Mentioned vacancies have been announced under the TISS Research Associate Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a qualification of PhD Scholar in the advanced stage of dissertation writing or who has submitted the final dissertation, or candidates who have already obtained a PhD in Social Sciences (Economics, Social Work, Social Entrepreneurship, Sociology, Management, Rural Management, Development Studies preferred) c

qualification.details: Educational Qualifications (as on 30 June 2026): PhD Scholar who is either in the advanced stage of dissertation writing or has already submitted the final dissertation in the areas of Social Sciences (Economics, Social Work, Social Entrepreneurship, Sociology, Management, Rural Management, Development Studies are preferable). Candidates who have already received their PhD Degree are also encouraged to apply. Others please do not apply. | Desirable Experience: | Community Interaction in Rural Areas Household-level Survey in Rural Areas Literature Review Quantitative Data Processing and Cleaning Conducting In-depth Interviews, Focus Group Discussions (FGDs) and Observation Transcribing Qualitative Data and Qualitative Data Analysis Quantitative Data Analysis Writing Research Reports Knowledge of software: Atlas.ti, SPSS, STATA, Python, N-Vivo (preferable)

physical_eligibility.details: Excellent verbal communication skills Excellent writing skills Enthusiastic and self-motivated Excellent team worker Strong understanding of qualitative and quantitative research processe

all_official_links.label: Download TISS Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TISS Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Download TISS Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Project Duration: 6 Months (July-December 2026) Location: Mumbai (candidate must stay in Mumbai or nearby areas) with frequent travel to Mandla, Madhya Pradesh

content_sections.heading: TISS Research Associate Mandla Project 2026 Overview

rows.tata_institute_of_social_sciences_tiss_m: Financial health and entrepreneurial opportunity of aquatic food producers in Mandla, Madhya Pradesh

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for TISS Research Associate Mandla Project
content_sections.text: Educational Qualifications (as on 30 June 2026): PhD Scholar who is either in the advanced stage of dissertation writing or has already submitted the final dissertation in the areas of Social Sciences (Economics, Social Work, Social Entrepreneurship, Sociology, Management, Rural Management, Development Studies are preferable). Candidates who have already received their PhD Degree are also encouraged to apply. Others please do not apply. Desirable Experience: Community Interaction in Rural Areas Household-level Survey in Rural Areas Literature Review Quantitative Data Processing and Cleaning Conducting In-depth Interviews, Focus Group Discussions (FGDs) and Observation Transcribing Qualitative Data and Qualitative Data Analysis Quantitative Data Analysis Writing Research Reports Knowledge of software: Atlas.ti, SPSS, STATA, Python, N-Vivo (preferable)

content_sections.heading: Job Roles & Responsibilities
content_sections.text: Frequent travel to Mandla, Madhya Pradesh Identify households and stakeholders for interviews and FGDs Quantitative & Qualitative Data Collection in villages of Mandla District Quantitative Data Cleaning, Processing and Analysis Transcribing Qualitative Data and Analysis Ensure timely delivery of preliminary analysis Writing Research Report

content_sections.heading: Competencies Required
content_sections.text: Excellent verbal communication skills Excellent writing skills Enthusiastic and self-motivated Excellent team worker Strong understanding of qualitative and quantitative research processe

content_sections.heading: TISS Research Associate Important Links
content_sections.text: Official Notification PDF: Click here Official Website: Click here Join Arattai Channel: Click Here Join Telegram Channel: Click Here Join WhatsApp Channel: Click Here Sarkari Result: Click Here Download Mobile App: Click Here

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for TISS Research Associate Mandla Project 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to send your biodata is 10 July 2026 to [email protected].

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for TISS Research Associate in Mandla Project?
faq.answer: Selected candidate will receive Rs. 40,000 per month (consolidated) for 6 months.

faq.question: Q3. Who can apply for TISS Research Associate Position 2026?
faq.answer: PhD Scholars in advanced stage or those who have submitted thesis (or awarded PhD) in Social Sciences, Economics, Rural Development, Social Entrepreneurship etc.

faq.question: Q4. Is prior rural fieldwork experience mandatory for TISS Mandla Project?
faq.answer: Prior experience in community interaction, household surveys, FGDs, and data analysis in rural areas is highly desirable.

faq.question: Q5. Where is the Research Associate required to stay during the project?
faq.answer: The candidate must stay in Mumbai or nearby areas during the entire project duration.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are there for TISS Research Associate Mandla Project?
faq.answer: Only 1 position of Research Associate is available under this project.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I send for TISS Research Associate application?
faq.answer: Send your updated Biodata / CV highlighting PhD status, research experience, and relevant skills to [email protected].

faq.question: Q8. Will there be an interview for TISS Research Associate selection?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be called for an online interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent job or project-based position?
faq.answer: This is a purely temporary project-based position for 6 months only.

faq.question: Q10. What software knowledge is preferred for TISS Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Knowledge of Atlas.ti, SPSS, STATA, Python, or N-Vivo is considered an advantage.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for TISS Research Associate Mandla Project 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to send your biodata is 10 July 2026 to samapti@tiss.ac.in.
